languages.text: Генетор экстремис Эоганн Фебрус пригласил Вольного Торговца в Сектор Бионика для участия в эксперименте. Его цель — обуздать смерть и вычислить формулу праведности.
Extremis Genetor Eogunn Februs has invited the Rogue Trader to the Sector Bionica to participate in an experiment. His goal is to master death and calculate the formula for righteousness.
languages.original_text: Генетор экстремис Эоганн Фебрус пригласил Вольного Торговца в Сектор Бионика для участия в эксперименте. Его цель — обуздать смерть и вычислить формулу праведности.

traits.locale_text: Extremis Genetor Eogunn Februs has invited the Rogue Trader to the Sector Bionica to participate in an experiment. His goal is to master death and calculate the formula for righteousness.
Extremis Genetor Eogunn Februs has invited the Rogue Trader to the Sector Bionica to participate in an experiment. His goal is to master death and calculate the formula for righteousness.
Extremis Genetor Eogunn Februs has invited the Rogue Trader to the Sector Bionica to participate in an experiment. His goal is to master death and calculate the formula for righteousness.

languages.text: エクストレミス・ジェネーター・エオガン・フェブルスは、ローグ・トレーダーをセクター・ビオニカに招き、実験に参加させます。彼の目的は、死を克服し、正義の公式を計算することです。
languages.original_text: Extremis Genetor Eogunn Februs has invited the Rogue Trader to the Sector Bionica to participate in an experiment. His goal is to master death and calculate the formula for righteousness.

traits.locale_text: エクストレミス・ジェネーター・イオグン・フェブルスは、ローグ・トレーダーをセクター・ビオニカに招き、実験に参加させます。彼の目的は、死を克服し、正義の公式を計算することです。

languages.text: 特级基因士伊奥贡·费布鲁斯邀请行商浪人前往仿生区参加一项实验。他的目标是掌控死亡，算出量化正义的公式。
languages.original_text: Extremis Genetor Eogunn Februs has invited the Rogue Trader to the Sector Bionica to participate in an experiment. His goal is to master death and calculate the formula for righteousness.

traits.locale_text: 特级基因士伊奥贡·费布鲁斯邀请行商浪人前往仿生区参加一项实验。他的目标是掌控死亡，算出量化正义的公式。

languages.text: Le genetor extremis Eogunn Februs a invité {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} dans le secteur Bionica pour participer à une expérience qui a pour objectif de triompher de la mort et de calculer la formule de la vertu.
languages.original_text: Extremis Genetor Eogunn Februs has invited the Rogue Trader to the Sector Bionica to participate in an experiment. His goal is to master death and calculate the formula for righteousness.

traits.locale_text: Le genetor extremis Eogunn Februs a invité {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} dans le secteur Bionica pour participer à une expérience qui a pour objectif de triompher de la mort et de calculer la formule de la vertu.

languages.text: El genetor extremis Eogunn Februs ha invitado a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente al sector Bionica para que participe en un experimento. Su objetivo es dominar la muerte y calcular la fórmula de la virtud.
languages.original_text: Extremis Genetor Eogunn Februs has invited the Rogue Trader to the Sector Bionica to participate in an experiment. His goal is to master death and calculate the formula for righteousness.

traits.locale_text: El genetor extremis Eogunn Februs ha invitado a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente al sector Bionica para que participe en un experimento. Su objetivo es dominar la muerte y calcular la fórmula de la virtud.

languages.text: Genetör Extremis Eogunn Februs, Hür Tacir'i bir deneye katılmak üzere Sektör Biyonika'ya davet etti. Amacı ölüme hükmetmek ve doğruluğun formülünü ortaya koymak.
languages.original_text: Extremis Genetor Eogunn Februs has invited the Rogue Trader to the Sector Bionica to participate in an experiment. His goal is to master death and calculate the formula for righteousness.

traits.locale_text: Genetör Extremis Eogunn Februs, Hür Tacir'i bir deneye katılmak üzere Sektör Biyonika'ya davet etti. Amacı ölüme hükmetmek ve doğruluğun formülünü ortaya koymak.

languages.text: Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs hat {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} in den Sektor Bionica eingeladen, um einem Experiment beizuwohnen. Er möchte den Tod besiegen und eine Formel der Rechtschaffenheit berechnen.
